title: Eliminate is_simple_space_prop: merge routing and parsing into one function
description: is_simple_space_prop is a routing predicate that must stay in sync with parse_simple_space_prop. The pair can be collapsed into a single function: fn try_parse_simple_space_prop<'a>(path: &str, value: &'a Value) -> Option<Result<SimplePropPatch<'a>, Value>>. Returns None for non-simple paths (try member-patch), Some(Ok(op)) on success, Some(Err(e)) on type error. Phase 1 becomes: match try_parse_simple_space_prop(path, value) { Some(Ok(op)) => {simple_ops.push(op); continue;}, Some(Err(e)) => {update_err=Some(e); break;}, None => { validate_member_patch... } }. This eliminates the _ => runtime sentinel and makes the routing exhaustive.
